body.content: Delta-0 has become one of the largest custom factions in SCP:RP

*As of 23 April 2026,* **Delta-0 “Livid Night” has surpassed 1,000 members.** This milestone marks a significant achievement in its ongoing development within the SCP:RP community for over the last 8 month. It reflects a long and dedicated journey for both High Command and faction members alike. Over time, Delta-0 has continued to expand and evolve, __now standing as one of the largest custom factions in SCP:RP.__
**Several events** are currently being planned by the Delta-0 High Command to commemorate this momentous occasion. __The list of activities will be provided below.__
We now sit as one of the largest custom factions in SCPRP!!
body.attribution: duck4594, Delta-0 "Livid Night" Task Force Director.
